content.en:
Seeing that the Ultimate Ancient Demons around him were unwilling to help him, Dovi Ancient Demons really began to panic.

Several of the Ultimate Ancient Demons in her tribe had long been trapped by other Ultimate Ancient Demons, and they were all unable to protect themselves, and they couldn't help her at all.

At this moment, she was truly in a desperate situation.

Knowing this, she should have united with some Ultimate Ancient Demons, so this is not the situation today.

She wants to escape, as long as she is allowed to escape, she can slaughter these ultimate ancient demons one by one in the future.

However, these Ultimate Ancient Demons had long expected that the Dovi Ancient Demons would choose to flee and would not choose to kill to the end.

Thereupon.

The four Ultimate Ancient Demons who were good at banning made a move, and teamed up to arrange a banning formation to directly block this area.

"Extreme Dao Sealing Array!"

This is the most terrifying forbidden formation, based on the four ultimate ancient demons and four extreme ultimate treasures, the forbidden formation is formed.

Such a formation would consume the power of the Ultimate Ancient Demon very much, and it would not last long.

In normal times, Dovi Gumo only needs to wait for the formation time to pass, and he can easily break the formation.

But now, she is still under siege by many ultimate ancient demons, and there is not enough time for 907 to survive.

It's a desperate situation!

A real desperate situation!

Another period of time passed, and Dovi Ancient Demon killed another Ultimate Ancient Demon, but she was already severely damaged at the moment and was about to fall.

Seeing this, those ultimate ancient demons were excited one by one.

Moreover, that space-time level Extreme Dao Ultimate Treasure has also begun to be truly conceived, and it can be snatched as long as the light dissipates.

"Quickly slay the Dovi Demons!"

Aromu Ancient Demon said.

Thundered!!!

Many Ultimate Ancient Demons erupted with aura, and a Gate Extreme Ultimate Arcane slashed at the Dovi Ancient Demons.

Then.

Dovi knew that she wouldn't survive, and she couldn't even withstand this last wave of attacks, but she didn't want to fall like that.

"Let's die together!"

"The Seventh Form - the Final Form!"

Seeing the seventh form of the Dovi Ancient Demons, the faces of the Ultimate Ancient Demons changed drastically.

No matter what, there is only the sixth form, which is the form limit of the peak Ultimate Ancient Demon, and it is also the form limit of the Ultimate Ancient Demon.

In the past, many Ultimate Ancient Demons tried to develop the seventh form, but they were unsuccessful, because the body of the Ultimate Ancient Demon was already the most perfect body, and under this perfect body, how could the seventh form be developed?

In fact, even the sixth form couldn't increase the strength of the Ultimate Ancient Demon by much.

Therefore, when these ultimate ancient demons were fighting, they didn't use the form secret method very much, because it was not very useful.

But now, Dovi Gumo has cast a seventh form.

As soon as the seventh form was revealed, the aura of the final calamity appeared on the body of the Dovi Ancient Demon.

"Dovi Ancient Demon, this guy is a madman, and he created the seventh form with the breath of the Doomsday, and this form will definitely collapse the physical body. "

The pupils of the Ancient Demon of Aromu shrank and said.

That's right, this form is actually an incomplete form secret method, and the strength of the Dovi Ancient Demon has not been able to improve for countless years, so she wants to create a seventh form, and the aura of the final calamity is strong enough.

Therefore, she tried to sharpen the aura of the final calamity, so as to merge into the aura of the final calamity, but since this form of secret method had not yet been perfected, she was only deducing, and had not really performed it.

This is her first time.

She knew that she was about to fall, so why did she care if her body would collapse!

Under the final form, the aura of the Dovi Ancient Demon skyrocketed tenfold, and the terrifying aura made these ultimate ancient demons terrify one by one.

In a flash.

With a casual stroke of his hand, the Dovi Ancient Demon slashed out a final form technique.

The body of the Ultimate Ancient Demon was destroyed, and all of them fell, and even the body of the Aromu Ancient Demon was shattered, leaving only a part of its vitality. And the forbidden array was broken in an instant, and the power of this blow directly penetrated the endless time and space, directly cutting into the space-time level Extreme Dao Ultimate Treasure.

Actually, this is not a coincidence, but a deliberate act of the Dovi Ancients.

"Not good!"

Those Ultimate Ancient Demons saw that the space-time level Extreme Dao Ultimate Arcana was attacked, and they actually had time to block it, but who would dare to block it!

Isn't it looking for death to block at this time?

Therefore, they could only watch as the space-time level Extreme Dao Ultimate Treasure was hit, and then directly shattered.

After all, this blow of the Dovi Ancient Demon, even if it is not as good as the space-time level Ultimate Ancient Demon, it is not too much worse, how can a mere treasure be blocked?

And after the attack of the multi-dimensional ancient demon shattered the ultimate treasure of the space-time level, there was still a part of the power left, which directly penetrated this endless space-time domain, and then slashed into the depths of the endless space-time line.

This moment.

Many Ultimate Ancient Demons sensed the shock of the Endless Space-Time Domain, and this large space-time bubble was injured.

What's even more desperate is that the Dovi Ancient Demon has not yet fallen, and can continue to attack.

"Hahahaha, I'm dead, you all have to die!!!"

Dovi Ancient Demon's body was collapsing, but she struck again, and attacked one ultimate ancient demon after another indiscriminately.

However, she didn't attack the Ultimate Ancient Demons of her tribe.

If she can kill all the ultimate ancient demons of the other main divisions, the main headquarters of the Heavenly Tower can still dominate everything.

The devastating light of the end tore through all the voids, slaying many of the ultimate ancient demons.

The Ultimate Ancient Demon couldn't care about the shattered space-time level ultimate treasure at this moment, and only thought about escaping. []

......

"I was just watching the play, and I was also attacked!"

Ye Tian looked at the attack that was coming towards him, and immediately cast the Time Sword Cover to defend, as well as the Extreme Ultimate Sword Realm, Time Solid and other Extreme Path Ultimate Arcanes.

Fortunately, the attack against him was not too strong, and he was able to block it, only suffering minor injuries, while the other Ultimate Ancient Demons were uncomfortable.

Under a wave of indiscriminate attacks, hundreds of Ultimate Ancient Demons fell directly, and many Ultimate Ancient Demons were severely damaged.

"I can't let her continue to attack, take advantage of the collapse of her body, and directly shatter her in a wave!"

The other surviving Ultimate Ancient Demons said.

As a result, the other Ultimate Ancient Demons, whether they were hit hard or avoided by luck, took action one after another.

Countless rays of light covered the body of the Dovi Ancient Demon, and before he died, the Dovi Ancient Demon also burst out with the final blow, burning all its power, differentiating countless attacks, and killing all the ultimate Ancient Demons.
